div.class: pt-3 pt-lg-0 col-12 col-md col-lg-4 col-xl-3 o_my_sidebar
pointer-events-none absolute top-3.5 start-4 text-gray-900 text-opacity-40 dark:text-gray-200

input.class: h-12 w-full border-0 bg-transparent ps-11 pe-4 text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-500 dark:placeholder-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 focus:ring-0 sm:text-sm

li.t-att-style: 'color: white;background: red;' if current and current == 'wallet' else ''

li.t-att-class: 'main_selected_menu_a' if current and current in ['products','customers','3pl','orders'] else ''

div.class: fixed container-fluid d-flex justify-content-center align-items-end vh-80 z-10 cursor-pointer

a.class: dropdown-toggle btn btn-light border-0 px-0 text-muted align-baseline

div.div: To import your products in Excel we require a SKU number and Item Name.Beyond that you can add extra information. Download our Product Import Template.

div.span: or drag and drop file here

div.div: You can add extra information later.

div.p: Welcome to THE HUB TERMINUS LIMITED! Your space for secure storage solutions. Discover our range of storage options for businesses and individuals. Safe, reliable, and ready to accommodate your needs. Explore our website to find your perfect storage fit. Thank you for choosing us!
Connect to The HUb Integrate your ecommerce platform with The Hub to your products, or add products Manually.

t.div: Your account is awaiting administrator’s activation !
